title: WEC Energy Group to announce 2021 fourth-quarter and year-end financial results Feb. 3
text: MILWAUKEE, Jan. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- WEC Energy Group Inc. (NYSE: WEC) will issue its 2021 fourth-quarter and full-year earnings news release before the stock market opens Thursday, Feb. 3. A conference call for investors and security analysts is scheduled for the same day at 1 p.m.
